news.headline: Hong Kong banks replace burnt cash from residents of fire-ravaged Wang Fuk Court
news.summary:
Hong Kong’s note-issuing banks are replacing burnt cash for Wang Fuk Court residents, following emergency measures introduced by the city’s Monetary Authority and lenders to support those affected by last November’s devastating fire at the Tai Po estate.

news.headline: Pakistan importing cotton from US, Brazil even before local ginning season

news.headline: Africa Day 2026: Has the continent achieved true liberation?
news.summary: Africa Day 2026 spotlights power, debt and digital control as Africans redefine sovereignty.
